MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-05-2015 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Oct-04-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar May-05-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Deb Graceffa, Esq. of Gargalicana/Graceffa LLP (510-251-2000) for Plaintiff/Moving party Jeffrey Kant.
William King, Esq. (707-331-2834) specially appearing for Defendant/opposing party Mark S. Albi.

ARGUED. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF JEFFREY KANT's Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint is DENIED. Plaintiff failed to comply with CRC 3.1324. Order is signed. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY/RESPONSE TO DISCOVERY
Off Calendar Feb-17-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The court adopted its tentative ruling and ruled as follows:
PLAINTIFF JEFFREY KANT's MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY/RESPONSE TO DISCOVERY is Off calendar per the notice of withdrawal of motion filed on February 3, 2015. Judge Pro-tem; Steve Stein, Clerk: Cynthia S. Herbert, Not Reported. =302/jp
